message:
chore(conformance): refresh oracle differential reports + rustfmt fnp-python helper

Mechanical follow-up after the recent edge-case test additions
(I/O uint16/tab, FFT ifft_len2/fftfreq, iter cast-class/scalar-broadcast,
RNG upper_bound=1, linalg trace/det, string isdigit/title, shape/stride
F-order, polynomial int/der, masked min/max, datetime, signal):

- crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/oracle_outputs/*.json (12 reports):
  regenerate the differential report headers/case counts so they reflect
  the new corpus totals after the per-domain edge-case additions.
- crates/fnp-python/src/lib.rs: rustfmt the SplitHelperKind::Flexible
  branch in `split_helper_default` (purely formatting; no behavior
  change). The new shape stays under the project line-length budget.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: flush of beads task transitions touched by the
  conformance work.

No production code semantics change in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
